title: HAL Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Aircraft Division, Nasik (A Maharatna CPSE)
job_location: Industrial Health Center, HAL, Ojhar Township, Nashik – 422 207
short_info: HAL Aircraft Division, Nasik is engaging 02 Physiotherapists on a visiting basis at the Industrial Health Center, Ojhar Township, Nashik.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates via Email

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) or Master in Physiotherapy (MPT) from a recognized institution; qualification must be recognized by the Occupational Therapy and Physiotherapy Council

vacancy_details.Qualification: Bachelor in Physiotherapy / Master in Physiotherapy from a recognized institution

salary_details.details: Applicants are required to clearly indicate their expected remuneration per visit (considering a minimum of 03 visits per week) in the application form. The remuneration per visit will be fixed by HAL. In addition, as per the applicable rules of HAL at the time of engagement, selected candidates will also be eligible for conveyance reimbursement per visit. No other allowances or benefits will be provided beyond what is indicated above.

selection_process: Stage 1 - Shortlisting: Suitable candidates from among the applicants will be shortlisted for the interview based on the qualifications
and completeness of the application as per the prescribed format.
Stage 2 - Personal Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview conducted at HAL Hospital
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply offline only using the prescribed application format (Annexure-I). No application/resume will be accepted by email.
Download the application form (Annexure-I) from the HAL official website: www.hal-india.co.in
Fill in the application form completely and correctly in the prescribed format. Indicate the expected remuneration per visit clearly in the application.
